evals.prompt: Review the current mouse scroll implementation against docs/plan/mouse-scroll-messages.html and write the feedback to feedback.md.
evals.expected_output: The skill should read the plan, inspect the current diff, run a relevant verification command, and write feedback.md with findings first in conventional comment style.
assertions: Reads the plan document before judging the code
Inspects git status or git diff for the active changes
Runs a relevant verification command through nix develop
Uses conventional comment labels such as issue, suggestion, or praise

evals.prompt: Do a senior review of the current branch against the ADR and leave only actionable feedback.
evals.expected_output: The skill should scope the review to the requested ADR and changed files, then prioritize bugs, regressions, and missing tests over general summary.
assertions: Reviews against the requested source of truth
Focuses on changed files instead of the whole repository
